targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT interval_label FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (SELECT total_return_pct FROM period_interval_attribution WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AND interval_label=(SELECT interval_label FROM li) AND window='1m' LIMIT 1) AS value

targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT interval_label FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (SELECT price_contribution_pct FROM period_interval_attribution WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AND interval_label=(SELECT interval_label FROM li) AND window='1m' LIMIT 1) AS value

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT interval_label FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT interval_label FROM li),'n/a') AS value
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT interval_label FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT interval_label FROM li),'n/a') AS value

targets.queryText: SELECT period_start_date || '..' || period_end_date AS value FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT period_start_date || '..' || period_end_date AS value FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (pi.interval_end || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, MAX(CASE WHEN pia.window='1m' THEN pia.total_return_pct END) AS TR1m, MAX(CASE WHEN pia.window='3m' THEN pia.total_return_pct END) AS TR3m, MAX(CASE WHEN pia.window='6m' THEN pia.total_return_pct END) AS TR6m, MAX(CASE WHEN pia.window='12m' THEN pia.total_return_pct END) AS TR12m FROM period_interval_attribution pia JOIN period_intervals pi ON pi.period_type=pia.period_type AND pi.period_start_date=pia.period_start_date AND pi.period_end_date=pia.period_end_date AND pi.interval_label=pia.interval_label WHERE pia.period_type='MONTH' AND pia.period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND pia.period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) GROUP BY pi.interval_end ORDER BY pi.interval_end
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (pi.interval_end || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, MAX(CASE WHEN pia.window='1m' THEN pia.total_return_pct END) AS TR1m, MAX(CASE WHEN pia.window='3m' THEN pia.total_return_pct END) AS TR3m, MAX(CASE WHEN pia.window='6m' THEN pia.total_return_pct END) AS TR6m, MAX(CASE WHEN pia.window='12m' THEN pia.total_return_pct END) AS TR12m FROM period_interval_attribution pia JOIN period_intervals pi ON pi.period_type=pia.period_type AND pi.period_start_date=pia.period_start_date AND pi.period_end_date=pia.period_end_date AND pi.interval_label=pia.interval_label WHERE pia.period_type='MONTH' AND pia.period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND pia.period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) GROUP BY pi.interval_end ORDER BY pi.interval_end

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (interval_end || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, twr_1m_pct AS TWR1m, twr_3m_pct AS TWR3m, twr_6m_pct AS TWR6m, twr_12m_pct AS TWR12m FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (interval_end || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, twr_1m_pct AS TWR1m, twr_3m_pct AS TWR3m, twr_6m_pct AS TWR6m, twr_12m_pct AS TWR12m FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT interval_label FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT window AS Win, round(total_return_pct,3) AS TRPct, round(income_contribution_pct,3) AS IncomePct, round(price_contribution_pct,3) AS PricePct, substr(COALESCE(top_json,''),1,28) AS Top, substr(COALESCE(bottom_json,''),1,28) AS Bottom FROM period_interval_attribution WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AND interval_label=(SELECT interval_label FROM li) ORDER BY CASE window WHEN '1m' THEN 1 WHEN '3m' THEN 2 WHEN '6m' THEN 3 WHEN '12m' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT interval_label FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT window AS Win, round(total_return_pct,3) AS TRPct, round(income_contribution_pct,3) AS IncomePct, round(price_contribution_pct,3) AS PricePct, substr(COALESCE(top_json,''),1,28) AS Top, substr(COALESCE(bottom_json,''),1,28) AS Bottom FROM period_interval_attribution WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AND interval_label=(SELECT interval_label FROM li) ORDER BY CASE window WHEN '1m' THEN 1 WHEN '3m' THEN 2 WHEN '6m' THEN 3 WHEN '12m' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END LIMIT 5
